reviews.comment:
Bien atendida, pero siempre muy concurrida. Suele haber largas filas. Evitar horarios comerciales. Tiene para medir presión de gomas gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but always very busy. There are often long lines. Avoid business hours. They offer free tire pressure monitoring.

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación en muuuuuuchos kilómetros a la redonda, así que no me quedo otra que cargar premium que era lo que había. Más allá de eso el personal excelente

(Translated by Google)
It's the only station for miles around, so I had no choice but to fill up with premium, which was all they had. Aside from that, the staff was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcmJhY25nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  todos los combustibles y todos los medios de pago.
Baños limpios.
Ir con paciencia porque se suelen formar largas colas por ser la única YPF del ACA en muchos km.
Ubicación con vista privilegiada.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, all fuels and all payment methods accepted.
Clean restrooms. Be prepared for long lines as it's the only ACA-affiliated YPF station for many kilometers. Excellent location with a great view.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKemVIRlJnEAE
